title: MGNREGA
description: Providing 100 days of guaranteed wage employment to rural households.
benefits: Guaranteed manual work at government-fixed minimum wages.

title: PM Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan (PM-SYM)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers like rickshaw pullers and domestic workers.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹3,000 after reaching age 60.

title: Ayushman Bharat-PMJAY
description: Health insurance for vulnerable and low-income families.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization.

title: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Low-cost life insurance scheme for bank account holders.
benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakh in case of death due to any reason.

title: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance scheme with a very low annual premium.
benefits: ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total disability.

title: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Providing affordable housing to rural poor.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.2 lakh to ₹1.3 lakh to build a pucca house.

title: PM SVANidhi
description: Collateral-free micro-credit for street vendors.
benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000 with interest subsidy.

title: DDU-GKY (Skill Training)
description: Placement-linked skill training program for rural youth.
benefits: Free skill training, placement support, and career counseling.

title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for all citizens, especially in the unorganized sector.
benefits: Fixed monthly pension ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000.

title: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Providing clean cooking fuel (LPG) to women from BPL families.
benefits: Deposit-free LPG connection and financial assistance for stove.

title: National Food Security Act (NFSA)
description: Ensuring access to essential food grains at highly subsidized prices.
benefits: 5 kg of food grains per person per month at ₹1-3 per kg.

title: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
description: Free food grains to NFSA beneficiaries to mitigate economic hardship.
benefits: Additional 5 kg rice/wheat per person free of cost.

title: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana (NULM)
description: Urban livelihoods mission to reduce poverty of urban poor households.
benefits: Support for SHGs, skill training, and street vendor welfare.

title: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Pensions for elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities.
benefits: Financial assistance for elderly (IGNOAPS) and widows (IGNWPS).

title: PM-eBus Sewa
description: Augmenting city bus operations with focused on e-buses.
benefits: Better and cheaper transportation for urban laborers.

title: Gig Workers Social Security Act
description: First-of-its kind law to provide social security to platform-based workers like Swiggy/Zomato/Dunzo.
benefits: Welfare fund, accident and health insurance for gig workers.

title: BOCW Pension Scheme
description: Pension for registered construction workers.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹1,500 for life.

title: Accident Compensation (BOCW)
description: Immediate financial relief to construction workers in case of onsite accidents.
benefits: ₹5 lakh for death and up to ₹2 lakh for disability.

title: Educational Assistance for Workers' Children
description: Financial help for education of children of registered construction workers.
benefits: ₹1,500 to ₹15,000 per year from school to professional courses.

title: Maternity Benefits for Registered Workers
description: Cash support for female workers registered with the labor board during pregnancy.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹30,000-50,000 for maternity.

title: Marriage Assistance for Workers
description: Grant for the marriage of registered workers or their children.
benefits: Financial gift of ₹50,000 for marriage expenses.

title: Ambedkar Labour Assistance
description: Distribution of free toolkits to laborers like barbers, masons, and cobblers.
benefits: Free specialized toolkits worth ₹10,000.

title: Thayi Bhagya
description: Ensuring safe institutional deliveries for poor families.
benefits: Free delivery in private hospitals and cash incentive.

title: Udyogini Scheme
description: Subsidy in loans for women to start micro-businesses.
benefits: Up to 30% subsidy on loans for starting stalls or small shops.

title: Kayaka Scheme
description: Zero percent interest loans for Self Help Groups (SHGs).
benefits: Zero interest on loans up to ₹5 lakh for SHGs.

title: Badavara Bandhu
description: Interest-free mobile bank for street vendors.
benefits: Interest-free daily loans up to ₹10,000 for small trades.

title: Charmashilpa Scheme
description: Support for leather artisans to modernize their produce.
benefits: Grants for modern machines and work sheds.

title: Madilu Kit
description: Essential kit for new mothers and babies from labor families.
benefits: Kit containing towels, soaps, clothes for baby and mother.

title: Bus Pass for Building Workers
description: Free bus passes for construction workers for city commuting.
benefits: Free monthly bus pass in Bangalore (BMTC) and elsewhere.

title: Karnataka Labour Welfare Board Educational Assistance
description: Scholarship for children of workers in industries and factories.
benefits: ₹3,000 to ₹10,000 per year for students.
